title: Integrate tool execution into agent-mode route
completion_summary: Integrated tool execution into agent mode route: toolRegistry init with translateTool/rememberTool/recallTool, stepExecutor dispatches to toolExecutor when step.tool is set, error handling captures failures
context_files: src/app/api/interpreter/route.ts (lines 108-242: existing agent mode branch; add tool execution loop)
acceptance_criteria: Route initializes ToolRegistry with translateTool, rememberTool, recallTool on startup
In agent mode: after decomposition, each step with a tool field invokes toolExecutor
Tool results are attached to each step's result field
Steps without tool field are executed via LLM (existing behavior from Phase B)
Tool execution failures are captured in step.error and step.status='failed'
Existing sessionMode='assistant' and 'interpreter' behavior COMPLETELY unchanged
deliverables: src/app/api/interpreter/route.ts (modified: add tool integration in agent branch)
